file.content:
# Enriched History — Full Conversation Summary

> Generated: 2026-04-05 11:10

## Key Session: Agent Office Dashboard

### Session 9756f4d4 (main session - 73 minutes)

**User Goal:** Build a local web dashboard to visualize and manage Claude Code agents spawned as teams

**What was built:**
- **Project:** `/Users/klauskollerkroeff/Documents/agent-office`
- **Server:** Express.js backend (`server.js`, port 3100) with REST API for agents/teams
- **Frontend:** `public/index.html`, `public/office.css` (walkable map), `public/app.js` (frontend)
- **Data store:** `agents.json` for custom agent descriptions
- **Features:**
  - `GET /api/agents` - lists all running agents from teams directory
  - `GET /api/teams` - lists all teams with task status
  - `POST /api/spawn` - spawns a new agent in a new Terminal window (creates `.command` file with env setup)
  - `PUT /api/agents/:id/description` - saves agent descriptions
  - `DELETE /api/teams/:name` - removes a team
  - Walkable office map visualization (still having issues - agents not spawning correctly into the map)

**Issues that came up during the session:**
- Agent spawner worked but agent wasn't spawning into the map visualization
- Couldn't write description (UI input not clickable)
- Terminal window opened but no prompt sent
- Dashboard loading page was slow/stuck
- User requested: "make the velocity 5x slower", "visualize all agents below the map"

**Pending work:**
- Fix agent spawn visualization on the map
- Fix the description input field
- Make the dashboard load faster
- Add "walkable" office map feature

### Other Sessions Summary

| Session ID | Duration | Main Topic |
|---|---|---|
| 51079045 | ~60 min | Auto Dream setup, skill improvements |
| d72c90d5 | ~15 min | Adding more skills via npx |
| 5b2f6383 | ~8 min | Agent model questions |
| 6c93a6d0 | ~10 min | Plugin/skill troubleshooting |
| 59a969d8 | ~10 min | More skill additions |
| 10952f53 | ~8 min | Frontend-design skill review |
| 8e50783d | ~15 min | Web-design-guidelines skill |
| 98308c36 | ~20 min | Hiring agent, command execution help |
| 44e0d268 | ~15 min | Testing/trying things out |
| db4187de | ~10 min | Casual conversation, testing |
| c23e64f1 | ~2 min | Current session |

**Common Themes:** Learning Claude Code tooling (skills, plugins, agent teams), setting up observability, building agent-office dashboard.

content.content:
1	# Regras de lançamento de agentes
2	
3	## PROIBIDO
4	- Nunca criar arquivos `.sh` temporários em `.tmp/` para lançar agentes
5	- Nunca usar arquivos intermediários que podem ser deletados antes da execução
6	
7	## OBRIGATÓRIO ao abrir agentes no Terminal
8	Use AppleScript com o comando inline diretamente, sem arquivos temporários:
9	
10	```applescript
11	tell application "Terminal"
12	    if not (exists window 1) then do script ""
13	    activate
14	    do script "cd '/Users/klauskollerkroeff/Documents/agent-office' && COMANDO_AQUI" in window 1
15	    set custom title of front window to "NOME DO AGENTE"
16	    set title displays custom title of front window to true
17	end tell
18	```
19	
20	## Motivo
21	Scripts temporários em `.tmp/` são deletados antes da execução e causam:
22	`zsh: no such file or directory: launch-XXXX.sh`

file.content:
# Regras de lançamento de agentes

## PROIBIDO
- Nunca criar arquivos `.sh` temporários em `.tmp/` para lançar agentes
- Nunca usar arquivos intermediários que podem ser deletados antes da execução

## OBRIGATÓRIO ao abrir agentes no Terminal
Use AppleScript com o comando inline diretamente, sem arquivos temporários:

```applescript
tell application "Terminal"
    if not (exists window 1) then do script ""
    activate
    do script "cd '/Users/klauskollerkroeff/Documents/agent-office' && COMANDO_AQUI" in window 1
    set custom title of front window to "NOME DO AGENTE"
    set title displays custom title of front window to true
end tell
```

## Motivo
Scripts temporários em `.tmp/` são deletados antes da execução e causam:
`zsh: no such file or directory: launch-XXXX.sh`

content.text:
Pronto! Here's what I did:

1. **Removed** the `/api/launch-script` endpoint — it was generating `.command` files for download, which is exactly the pattern we eliminated.

2. **Updated** `openTerminalTab()` to match the exact AppleScript format from your CLAUDE.md:
   - Added `if not (exists window 1) then do script ""` to ensure a window exists
   - Added `activate` to bring Terminal to the foreground
   - The `cd` to the project directory is now built into the AppleScript itself
   - Set `title displays custom title` directly on `front window`

3. **Cleaned up** command strings in both `/api/launch/:name` and `/api/launch-all` — no more manual `cd` prefixing since the function handles it.

**Result:** All agent launching now uses inline AppleScript via `osascript` — zero temporary `.sh` or `.command` files anywhere. The base64 encoding ensures no shell quoting issues.
